hero.title: Intelligence That Stays Yours
hero.subtitle: High-performance, privacy-centric AI infrastructure for iOS and macOS. No cloud, no surveillance, no internet required.

about.title: Why Anonymium AI?
about.description: Anonymium AI (AnonyIntel) brings state-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs) specialized for the Apple ecosystem. Experience 100% on-device inference with zero telemetry.

features.title: Premium Features
features.research_hub_desc: Scan, analyze, and synthesize structured reports—all while maintaining local-first privacy.
features.voice_desc: Natural, hands-free intelligence with on-device speech-to-text.
features.privacy_desc: 100% of weights, KV cache, and output generation remain in local memory.
features.speed_desc: Unified GPU-accelerated inference across iOS and macOS.
features.global_desc: Interface and intelligence localized for 9 major languages.
features.community_models_desc: Access a growing library of fine-tuned GGUF models directly from our dynamic cloud registry.

models.title: The Model Ecosystem
models.subtitle: Choose your intelligence level. Every model runs entirely on your device.
models.openhermes_desc: Highly versatile, community-fine-tuned roleplay & instruction model.

tech_specs.title: Core Architecture
tech_specs.backend_desc: Powered by a highly-tuned llama.cpp derivative via llama.xcframework.
tech_specs.mac_req: All M-Series and Intel-based Macs with 8GB+ RAM recommended (6GB Minimum).
tech_specs.ios_req: iPhone 15 Pro, iPhone 16, and later recommended for Pro-level models.

pricing.title: Simple, Fair Pricing
benefits: No Subscriptions - Pay once, own it for life

privacy_section.title: Security is Our Core Product
privacy_section.description: The "Anony" in Anonymium AI represents our commitment to total data sovereignty.
list: Zero Personal Data: We never see your name or email.
Apple StoreKit 2: Every transaction is verified and encrypted by Apple.
Zero Servers: No telemetry, logs, or conversation data is ever transmitted.
On-Device Truth: 100% AI inference on your local GPU/NPU.

footer.tagline: The end of the monthly subscription. The beginning of private AI.

support.title: Contact Support
support.description: Need help or have any questions? Our support team is here to assist you.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro_text: Welcome to Anonymium AI. Your privacy is our priority. Our philosophy: Your data is yours, and it should never leave your device.
privacy_policy.collection_text: We do not collect, store, or transmit any personal data. Anonymium AI operates entirely locally.
privacy_policy.processing_text: All AI processing happens directly on your hardware using Metal acceleration.
privacy_policy.third_party_text: We do not share data with third-party services. We have zero servers to store your data on.
privacy_policy.changes_text: We may update this policy from time to time.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step2_desc: Select the AI model that fits your device
how_it_works.step3_desc: Use voice or text to chat with your AI assistant

download_cta.title: Ready to Experience Private AI?
download_cta.subtitle: Download Anonymium AI today and take control of your intelligence.
